narrative:
Center Twp township has 2,054 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.0 percentage points.
